signature_scores.biological_directions: non-responders higher exhaustion & terminal cytotoxic (R<NR), consistent w/ literature but n.s.

significant.interpretation: higher Treg fraction in non-responders (more immunosuppression); single uncorrected hit

cross_validated_multivariate.verdict: T-state signature does NOT robustly predict CAR-T response at patient level (CV-AUROC ~chance)

honest_conclusion: Underpowered/negative clinical bridge; only suggestive Treg-fraction signal. T-state mean signatures do not separate responders in cross-validation.
